---
title: "Online Consultations via Google Meet"
description: "EpiPulse online healthcare consultations through secure Google Meet video conferencing."
---

# Online Consultations via Google Meet

EpiPulse provides secure, accessible healthcare consultations through Google Meet, allowing you to connect with healthcare professionals from home.

## How Online Consultations Work

### Before Your Consultation
- Ensure you have a stable internet connection
- Find a quiet, private space
- Have any relevant medical documents/reports ready
- Join 5-10 minutes before the scheduled time

### During Your Consultation
- You'll connect via a secure Google Meet video link
- Discuss your health concerns with your healthcare provider
- Ask questions and get personalized guidance
- Receive recommendations and next steps

### After Your Consultation
- Get a digital prescription via email
- Receive follow-up instructions
- Get any referrals if needed
- Have your consultation summary for reference

---

## Getting Started

**To book an online consultation:**

[**Book Your Appointment**](book_appointment.qmd)

---

## Technology Setup

### Minimum Requirements
- Device: Computer, tablet, or smartphone
- Internet: Minimum 2 Mbps connection
- Browser: Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge (latest version)
- Permissions: Camera and microphone access

### No Special Software Needed
- Google Meet works directly in your web browser
- No need to install additional applications
- Works on Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android

---

## Support

**Having trouble joining your consultation?**

- **Email**: appointments@epipulse.org
- **Contact**: [Reach Out](contact.qmd)

---

**[Book Your Online Consultation](book_appointment.qmd)**
- **Internet**: Broadband connection (2 Mbps minimum, 4 Mbps recommended)
- **Device**: Computer, tablet, or smartphone
- **Browser**: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, or Edge (latest versions)
- **Camera**: Built-in or external webcam
- **Microphone**: Built-in or external microphone
- **Audio**: Speakers or headphones

### Supported Devices

✅ **Desktop/Laptop**
- Windows, Mac, Linux
- Any modern browser

✅ **Tablets**
- iPad, Android tablets
- Google Meet app recommended

✅ **Smartphones**
- iPhone/iOS
- Android phones
- Google Meet app recommended

### Bandwidth Requirements

| Activity | Required Speed |
|----------|---|
| Video call | 2.5 - 4 Mbps |
| Screen sharing | 3 - 4 Mbps |
| Multiple participants | 5+ Mbps |

---

## Google Meet Features We Use

### For Better Consultation

1. **Video & Audio**
   - Crystal clear HD video
   - Noise cancellation
   - Multiple microphone options

2. **Screen Sharing**
   - Doctor can share medical documents
   - Patient can share reports
   - Easy reference during consultation

3. **Recording** (Optional)
   - Patient can request recording for reference
   - Consent required from both parties
   - Stored securely for future reference

4. **Chat**
   - Backup communication if audio fails
   - Share follow-up information
   - Exchange contact details if needed

5. **Hand Raise**
   - Patient can signal questions
   - Use for getting doctor's attention

---

## Before Your Consultation

### Checklist

- [ ] Confirm appointment date and time in your email/SMS
- [ ] Test internet connection on the device you'll use
- [ ] Install Google Meet app (recommended for mobile)
- [ ] Find a quiet, private space
- [ ] Gather any medical documents or reports
- [ ] Charge your device or keep it plugged in
- [ ] Plan 5 minutes buffer before appointment time
- [ ] Review your health symptoms/concerns
- [ ] Have pen and paper ready for notes
- [ ] Prepare list of medications you're currently taking

### Internet Speed Test

Before your appointment, test your connection:
1. Visit [speedtest.net](https://www.speedtest.net)
2. Run the test
3. Check if download speed is at least 2.5 Mbps
4. If slower, try:
   - Moving closer to WiFi router
   - Closing other apps using internet
   - Using wired connection if possible
   - Restarting your router

---

## Troubleshooting

### Common Issues & Solutions

**I Can't Hear the Doctor**
- Check microphone is not muted (unmute button at bottom)
- Check speaker volume
- Try wearing headphones
- Restart the meeting

**Doctor Can't Hear Me**
- Check microphone is working in Meet settings
- Test microphone before appointment
- Ensure no apps are blocking microphone
- Try different microphone if available

**Video Not Working**
- Allow camera permissions in browser
- Check if webcam is blocked by other app
- Try different browser
- Restart computer

**Poor Video Quality**
- Move closer to WiFi router
- Close other apps using internet
- Reduce video quality in Meet settings
- Check for WiFi interference (move away from microwave, etc.)

**Can't Find Meeting Link**
- Check email spam/junk folder
- Request link to be resent
- Call us: [Phone number]
- Check your booking confirmation page

**Wrong Device Name Showing**
- Disconnect other devices
- Update browser/app
- Restart Google Meet
- Log out and log back in

**Lag/Delay in Video**
- Check internet speed
- Close unnecessary browser tabs
- Restart WiFi router
- Move to stronger WiFi signal area

### Contact Support

If issues persist:
- **Email**: support@epipulse.org
- **Phone**: [Your phone number]
- **WhatsApp**: [Your WhatsApp number]
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 6 PM, Monday to Saturday

---

## Privacy & Security

### Your Data is Protected

- **Encryption**: Google Meet uses end-to-end encryption
- **Privacy**: Only you and the doctor can see/hear
- **Recording**: Only with explicit consent
- **Data Storage**: Secure servers with backup
- **HIPAA Compliant**: Follows healthcare privacy standards
- **No Third-Party Access**: Your data is not shared

### What You Should Do

- ✅ Join from a private location
- ✅ Use a strong password (if set)
- ✅ Report any security concerns immediately
- ❌ Don't share your meeting link with others
- ❌ Don't record without permission
- ❌ Don't join from shared/public devices without caution

---

## Meeting Etiquette

### Professional Behavior

**Please Do:**
- ✅ Arrive 5-10 minutes early
- ✅ Dress appropriately
- ✅ Maintain eye contact (look at camera)
- ✅ Speak clearly and directly
- ✅ Be respectful and honest about symptoms
- ✅ Ask for clarifications
- ✅ Take notes on advice

**Please Don't:**
- ❌ Multitask during consultation
- ❌ Have distracting backgrounds
- ❌ Use offensive language
- ❌ Interrupt the doctor
- ❌ Share personal information unnecessarily
- ❌ Involve too many people in the consultation
- ❌ Record without consent

---

## Meeting Schedule & Availability

### General OPD
- **Days**: Monday to Saturday
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 6 PM
- **Duration**: 30 minutes
- **Fee**: ₹200

### Deaddiction Consultation
- **Days**: Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday
- **Hours**: 10 AM - 4 PM
- **Duration**: 45 minutes
- **Fee**: ₹300

### NCD Care
- **Days**: Monday to Friday
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 5 PM
- **Duration**: 30 minutes
- **Fee**: ₹250

### Pediatric Care
- **Days**: Monday to Saturday
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 2 PM
- **Duration**: 30 minutes
- **Fee**: ₹250

---

## Cancellation & Rescheduling

### Policy

- **Cancel/Reschedule**: Up to 24 hours before appointment
- **No Show**: 2 consecutive no-shows may result in booking suspension
- **Emergency Cancellation**: Call us immediately

### How to Cancel/Reschedule

1. **Email**: appointments@epipulse.org
2. **Phone**: [Your phone number] 
3. **WhatsApp**: [Your WhatsApp number]
4. Mention your appointment ID

---

## After Your Consultation

### Follow-up Steps

1. **Review Prescription**
   - Read digital prescription carefully
   - Follow medication instructions
   - Note any precautions

2. **Follow Medical Advice**
   - Implement lifestyle changes suggested
   - Take medications as prescribed
   - Complete any recommended tests

3. **Book Follow-up**
   - If doctor recommended follow-up, book next appointment
   - Usually within 2-4 weeks

4. **Seek Emergency Help If:**
   - Symptoms worsen significantly
   - New severe symptoms develop
   - Allergic reaction to medication
   - Call 108 or go to nearest hospital

5. **Share Feedback**
   - Help us improve the service
   - Email feedback to: feedback@epipulse.org
   - Your input is valuable!

---

## FAQ

**Q: Is Google Meet secure for medical consultations?**
A: Yes. Google Meet uses industry-standard encryption and is HIPAA-compliant.

**Q: Can someone else be present during my consultation?**
A: Family members can be present with your knowledge, but the consultation is confidential.

**Q: What if I miss my appointment?**
A: Notify us within 24 hours to reschedule. Repeated no-shows may result in restrictions.

**Q: Can I get a recorded copy of the consultation?**
A: Only if you request recording before the appointment. Both parties must consent.

**Q: What payment methods do you accept?**
A: Currently cash/bank transfer. Contact us for payment options.

**Q: Is the prescription valid legally?**
A: Yes, digital prescriptions from our licensed doctors are legally valid in India.

**Q: Can I consult with a specific doctor?**
A: Request during booking. Subject to availability.

**Q: What happens during technical failure?**
A: Doctor will attempt to reconnect. If unable, a callback will be arranged.

---

## Ready to Book Your Consultation?

[**Book Your Appointment Now**](book_appointment.qmd)

---

## Need Help?

- **Email**: support@epipulse.org
- **Phone**: [Your phone number]
- **WhatsApp**: [Your WhatsApp number]
- **Hours**: 9 AM - 6 PM, Monday to Saturday

**Your health, our priority. Consult with confidence!**
